workout.warmup: Incline walk · 8–10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline — NOT optional on lower day, this is your back warmup.
workout.finisher: Incline walk · 10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline. Skip if session hits 65 min.
workout.coach_note: Last session before you travel Wednesday. Pendulum squat today (leg press was last lower). Carrying over the core you skipped Monday. Back's cleared a lot — but keep the warmup honest.

exercises.name: Pendulum Squat
exercises.note: Alternates with leg press — you did leg press last lower (6/16), so squat today. Sled ~50–60 lb. Upright torso, chest on the pad, squat to parallel or just below. Back fully supported. Last rep was tough at 70/side — hold here and own all 3 sets before adding.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust Machine
exercises.note: Bumping from 200 → 210 — you've hit 200×12×3 cleanly several sessions running. Plate-loaded, 10 lb increments only. Full hip extension, squeeze at top, NO hyperextension.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.note: Got 11 on set 3 the last two sessions — go for 12 on all three before we bump. Hamstrings are the weak link, don't rush it. If they feel tight, cap the last set at 10.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge (DB)
exercises.note: Bumping from 30 → 35 (you confirmed 30 was clean). Drive through the heel of the working leg, knee drive at the top if you want it.

exercises.name: Core Circuit (Back-Safe)
exercises.detail: Cable Crunch 66 lb × 12 → Dead Bugs 8–10/side → Side Plank 30s/side · 2 rounds
exercises.note: This is the core you carried over from Monday. Round into the cable crunch, lower back flat on dead bugs, hips stacked on the side plank. Fresh combo vs last lower day.
